issues.description: Effect is completely missing the core mechanic. Card has a conditional action: 'You may return 1 or more DON!! cards from your field to your DON!! deck: Add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active.' The DSL must include: (1) a condition allowing player choice to return DON cards, (2) an action to return those cards to DON deck, and (3) a search/add action to get a DON card from DON deck as active.
ReturnToHand is incorrect. Cards go to DON!! deck, not hand. This requires a custom action or clarification of card pool mechanics not standard in provided action types.
Target scope 'Self' is wrong. Should target 'DON cards from field' (opponent's choice), not the card itself.
Missing the second action: adding up to 1 DON card from DON deck and setting it as active. This is a SearchDeck + activation mechanic.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] You may return 1 or more DON!! cards from your field to your DON!! deck: Add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active.
